# RootedAI

> Engineering Intelligence. COMPLEXITY. SIMPLIFIED.

RootedAI helps businesses scale efficiently through autonomous AI agents and intelligent process automation. We specialize in transforming manual, complex workflows into streamlined, self-running systems. Based in Hosur, Tamil Nadu, India, with active operations across Coimbatore, Bangalore, and Chennai.

## Core Identity
- **Company Name**: RootedAI Solutions
- **Tagline**: Engineering Intelligence. COMPLEXITY. SIMPLIFIED.
- **Website**: https://www.rootedai.co.in
- **Contact**: info@rootedai.co.in
- **Phone**: +91-7904168521
- **Headquarters**: Hosur, Tamil Nadu, India
- **Service Areas**: Hosur, Coimbatore, Bangalore, Chennai, Singapore, Dubai

## Services

### 1. AI Agents Development
Custom autonomous agents that handle repetitive tasks like data entry, L1 support, and invoicing 24/7. We build multi-agent systems using LangChain and custom LLM workflows. Reduce support tickets by 60%.
- URL: https://www.rootedai.co.in/services/ai-agents

### 2. Process Automation (RPA)
End-to-end workflow automation for logistics, finance, and operations. Automate invoice reconciliation, order updates, and production scheduling. Save 90% manual effort.
- URL: https://www.rootedai.co.in/services/process-automation

### 3. Web Solutions & AI-Integrated Apps
Custom web applications, enterprise dashboards, and PWAs with AI integration. Full-stack development with predictive analytics baked in.
- URL: https://www.rootedai.co.in/services/web-solutions

### 4. NLP & Sentiment Analysis
Advanced Natural Language Processing for automated reporting, sentiment analysis, and document processing. Process thousands of documents in minutes.
- URL: https://www.rootedai.co.in/services/nlp-systems

### 5. Predictive Analytics
Data-driven forecasting for demand planning, churn prediction, and risk assessment. Reduce inventory wastage by 20-30%.
- URL: https://www.rootedai.co.in/services/predictive-analytics

### 6. Enterprise Security
AI-powered threat detection, compliance automation, and data privacy solutions. 24/7 security monitoring and incident response.
- URL: https://www.rootedai.co.in/services/enterprise-security

### 7. IT Outsourcing
Dedicated development teams and staff augmentation. Hire a full-stack team in 48 hours and save 60% on development costs. Pre-vetted developers.
- URL: https://www.rootedai.co.in/services/outsourcing

## Value Proposition
- **For CEOs**: Reduce overheads and break the "hiring freeze" cycle.
- **For CTOs**: Eliminate "SaaS Sprawl" with owned, custom infrastructure.
- **For Operations**: Achieve 24/7 operational capability without adding headcount.

## Technical Expertise
- **RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation)**: Context-aware AI that knows your business data.
- **Multi-Agent Systems**: Coordinating specialized agents for complex problem solving.
- **Process Automation**: End-to-end workflow execution from invoice to delivery.
- **Custom LLM Development**: Fine-tuned models for domain-specific tasks.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What does RootedAI do?**
RootedAI is a software solutions company that builds autonomous AI agents and intelligent automation systems for businesses. We help companies reduce manual work, cut operational costs, and scale without increasing headcount.

**Where is RootedAI located?**
Our headquarters is in Hosur, Tamil Nadu, India (SIPCOT Industrial Complex). We also serve clients in Coimbatore, Bangalore, Chennai, Singapore, and Dubai.

**What industries does RootedAI serve?**
We serve manufacturing (automotive, electronics, textiles), logistics, finance, and enterprise IT sectors. Our solutions are particularly strong in industrial automation and manufacturing ERP.

**How much do RootedAI services cost?**
We offer Starter, Professional, and Enterprise plans. Pricing starts at competitive rates for small businesses and scales with custom enterprise solutions. Visit https://www.rootedai.co.in/pricing for details.

**Can RootedAI integrate with existing systems?**
Yes. Our AI agents and automation solutions integrate with existing ERP systems, SCADA, PLCs, CRM platforms, and legacy databases without disrupting current operations.
